Idioma.MSG_No_se_ha_definido_el_calculo_para_CA: There is not define the calculation for QUANTITY
Idioma.MSG_No_se_ha_definido_el_calculo_para_IM: There is not define the calculation for VALUE
Idioma.MSG_No_se_ha_definido_el_calculo_para_RE: There is not define the calculation for RESULT
Idioma.MSG_Fecha_de_fin_de_la_accion: Date of end of the action
Idioma.MSG_Diferencia_en_dias_entre_fechas_de_a: Differentiates in days among dates of action
Idioma.MSG_Dias_habiles_igual_que_se_hace_en_va: Dias hábiles (igual que se hace en vacaciones) entre fechas acción
Idioma.MSG_Fecha_de_inicio_de_la_ultima_accion_: Date of end of the last action of the same type
Idioma.MSG_Fecha_de_fin_de_la_ultima_accion_del: Date of end of the last action of the same type
Idioma.MSG_Fecha_de_ingreso_del_empleado: Date of ingress of the employee
Idioma.MSG_Antiguedad_en_meses_del_funcionario: Seniority in months of the official
Idioma.MSG_Cantidad_de_meses_teorica_que_se_tom: Quantity of months (theoretical) that is taken into account for the calculation
Idioma.MSG_Fecha_de_inicio_para_la_suma_de_sala: Date of start for the sum of salaries and incidents
Idioma.MSG_Fecha_de_final_para_la_suma_de_salar: Date of end for the sum of salaries and incidents corresponds to Date1 Action or Date Salaries a quantity of periods
Idioma.MSG_Cantidad_de_meses_real_que_se_toma_e: Quantity of months (real) that is taken into account for the calculation
Idioma.MSG_Suma_de_los_salarios_pagados_entre_l: Adds of the full salaries among the dates of salaries
Idioma.MSG_Suma_de_las_incidencias_pagadas_entr: Adds of the full incidents among the dates of salaries
Idioma.MSG_Monto_del_salario_actual_del_funcion: Amount of the present salary of the official (to the date of the action)
Idioma.MSG_Porcentaje_de_salario_pagado_al_mome: Percentage of full salary to the moment of the action
Idioma.MSG_Fecha_de_inicio_de_las_acciones_cont: Date of start of the continuous actions of incapacity of the same type. If there is not continuous previous actions of the same type of incapacity, the date of start of the action returns
Idioma.MSG_Dias_acumulados_por_las_acciones_con: Accumulated days by the continuous actions of incapacity of the same type, excepting the days of not payment according to the type of payroll. If there is not continuous previous actions of the same type of incapacity, 0 returns (zero)
Idioma.MSG_Dias_de_vacaciones_acumuladas_hasta_: Vacations days accumulated to the effective date of the action of liquidation
Idioma.MSG_Dias_a_Pagar_a_partir_de_la_ultima_f: Days to be pay from the last date of payment to date of liquidation
Idioma.MSG_Tipo_de_nómina_que_un_empleado_tiene: Type of payroll that an employee has associate to the date of the action of personal (0=Weekly, 1 = Semiweekly 2=Biweeklyl, 3=Monthlyl)
Idioma.MSG_Factor_que_bajamos_al_tipo_de_nómina: Factor that descend to the type of payroll; the variable should indicate for the employee particularly to the date of the action the associated factor (28, 30, etc).
Idioma.MSG_Horas_diarias_de_jornada: Daily hours of workday: For an employee, to the date of action, should indicate for the workday in which that employee be found assigned the quantity of associated hours to the workday for calculation of daily salary (Example 8,6, etc)
Idioma.MSG_Pago_a_destajo: Payment to piecework: true if an employee has for the workday in which associate to the date of the action is found the indicator of 'Payment to piecework activated' in the day
Idioma.MSG_El_empleado_todavia_no_ha_sido_nombr: The employee has not been named.
Idioma.MSG_La_accion_no_se_puede_aplicar_Por_fa: The action cannot apply. Please it verify the parameters of configuration for Salary Structure.
